hard_forecasts.title: 局部邻域扰动应优先压低 family topology margin
hard_forecasts.detail: 若当前理论正确，小范围局部扰动首先应降低 concept family 对真 family 的拓扑 margin，而不是先打掉远程桥接收益。

hard_forecasts.title: 长程桥切断应优先压低 compact-boundary relation
hard_forecasts.detail: 针对束化长程桥的扰动，应先压低 compact-boundary relation 的 bridge score 和 endpoint support，而 distributed relation 不应首先崩塌。

hard_forecasts.title: 几何平滑增强不应替代目标化桥增强
hard_forecasts.detail: 如果只做广泛几何平滑或均匀扩张，不应系统性优于目标化桥接增强和慢时标稳定修正。

hard_forecasts.title: 高价值长程桥应呈束化稀疏调用
hard_forecasts.detail: 真正高价值的远程桥应表现为少量、束化、反复调用，而非大面积均匀激活。

project_readout.summary: P9C is positive only if the spatialized theory can state higher-risk forecasts that directly target the remaining open gaps rather than repeating generic support claims.
project_readout.next_question: If P9C holds, the next step is to consolidate the whole spatial theory into a final-stage verdict and then decide whether the remaining gaps are empirical or theoretical.
